name: easl
description: Instant hosting for AI agents — turn output into pages worth sharing

pnpm.comment: kysely is pinned because better-auth 1.6.13's @better-auth/kysely-adapter imports DEFAULT_MIGRATION_TABLE / DEFAULT_MIGRATION_LOCK_TABLE from the kysely package root. kysely 0.29.x moved those constants to the kysely/migration subpath and dropped them from the root entry, breaking the Worker bundle. Pin to 0.28.x (within better-auth's peer range) where they remain root exports.
